user.title: Solar Accelerator - API Key
user.description:
Enter the API key generated in the Solar Accelerator dashboard.

Find your key at: Integrations → Inverters → Home Assistant

choose_mode.title: Choose Configuration Mode
choose_mode.description:
Choose how to map inverter entities.

**Solarman** - automatic mapping for Solarman integration. Just provide the entity prefix.

**Manual** - manually select each entity from Home Assistant.

solarman_prefix.title: Solarman - Entity Prefix
solarman_prefix.description:
Enter the prefix used in Solarman integration.

Example: if your entities are named `sensor.deye_pv1_power`, the prefix is `deye`.

Data will be sent automatically at every full hour.

entities_pv.title: Entity Mapping - Photovoltaic Panels (PV)
entities_pv.description:
Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to PV panel data.

All entities must be mapped.

entities_pv_optional.title: Entity Mapping - Photovoltaic Panels (Optional)
entities_pv_optional.description:
Select optional entities for additional PV strings (e.g., second and third string).

If you don't have additional strings, leave empty.

entities_battery.title: Entity Mapping - Battery
entities_battery.description: Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to battery data.

entities_inverter.title: Entity Mapping - Inverter
entities_inverter.description: Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to inverter data.

entities_inverter_optional.title: Entity Mapping - Inverter (Optional Phases)
entities_inverter_optional.description:
Select optional entities for L2/L3 phases of the inverter.

If you have a single-phase installation, leave empty.

entities_grid.title: Entity Mapping - Grid
entities_grid.description: Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to grid data.

data_description.grid_power: + import from grid, - export to grid

entities_grid_optional.title: Entity Mapping - Grid (Optional CT Phases)
entities_grid_optional.description:
Select optional entities for CT phases L1/L2/L3 of the grid.

If you don't have CT meters for all phases, leave empty.

entities_load.title: Entity Mapping - Load
entities_load.description: Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to load data.

entities_load_optional.title: Entity Mapping - Load (Optional Phases)
entities_load_optional.description:
Select optional entities for L2/L3 phases of the load.

If you have a single-phase installation, leave empty.

entities_temp.title: Entity Mapping - Temperatures
entities_temp.description:
Select Home Assistant entities corresponding to temperature data.

Data will be sent automatically at every full hour.

error.invalid_api_key_format: API key must start with 'sa_haapi_' and be at least 40 characters
error.integration_disabled: Integration is disabled. Enable it in Solar Accelerator settings.
error.entity_not_found: Entity does not exist in Home Assistant
error.invalid_unit: Entity has invalid unit of measurement
error.invalid_prefix: Invalid prefix (only letters, numbers and underscores)

abort.no_entities: No entities available in Home Assistant
